user_query: For all days that don't have a dinner planned, add a cheap dinner option.

fields.name: Airport Food Court — Budget Dinner
fields.description: Quick, inexpensive dinner at the airport food court (sandwiches, pizza, or bowls). Fast service and easy to eat before boarding.

insertion_point.reasoning: Day 10 has no dinner planned and the day includes an airport snack at 4:00 PM and a 6:00 PM departure. Inserting a cheap dinner at 5:00–5:30 PM before the 6:00 PM flight (position 4, before the departure node) provides a quick, low-cost meal window.
